scan_output: Single-rule scan failed for fips_custom_stig_sub_policy (rule=xccdf_org.ssgproject.content_rule_fips_custom_stig_sub_policy). Could not verify.

llm_verdict.message:
<function=review_plan>
<parameter=plan_description>
Create the cryptographic policy module STIG.pmod in /etc/crypto-policies/policies/modules, set the system policy to FIPS:STIG, and apply the changes.
Steps:
  1. Create the directory if it doesn't exist: [ ! -d /etc/crypto-policies/policies/modules ] && mkdir -p /etc/crypto-policies/policies/modules
  2. Create the file STIG.pmod with the required content using printf.
  3. Update /etc/crypto-policies/config to set POLICY=FIPS:STIG.
  4. Apply the changes with update-crypto-policies --apply.
</parameter>
</function>
<function=run_cmd>
<parameter=command>
[ ! -d /etc/crypto-policies/policies/modules ] && mkdir -p /etc/crypto-policies/policies/modules
</parameter>
</function>
<function=run_cmd>
<parameter=command>
printf 'cipher@SSH=AES-256-GCM AES-256-CTR AES-128-GCM AES-128-CTR\nmac@SSH=HMAC-SHA2-512 HMAC-SHA2-256\n' > /etc/crypto-policies/policies/modules/STIG.pmod
</parameter>
</function>
<function=run_cmd>
<parameter=command>
sed -i 's/^POLICY=.*/POLICY=FIPS:STIG/' /etc/crypto-policies/config
</parameter>
</function>
<function=run_cmd>
<parameter=command>
update-crypto-policies --apply
</parameter>
</function>

reasoning_messages.content:
<function=review_plan>
<parameter=plan_description>
Create the cryptographic policy module STIG.pmod in /etc/crypto-policies/policies/modules, set the system policy to FIPS:STIG, and apply the changes.
Steps:
  1. Create the directory if it doesn't exist: [ ! -d /etc/crypto-policies/policies/modules ] && mkdir -p /etc/crypto-policies/policies/modules
  2. Create the file STIG.pmod with the required content using printf.
  3. Update /etc/crypto-policies/config to set POLICY=FIPS:STIG.
  4. Apply the changes with update-crypto-policies --apply.
</parameter>
</function>
<function=run_cmd>
<parameter=command>
[ ! -d /etc/crypto-policies/policies/modules ] && mkdir -p /etc/crypto-policies/policies/modules
</parameter>
</function>
<function=run_cmd>
<parameter=command>
printf 'cipher@SSH=AES-256-GCM AES-256-CTR AES-128-GCM AES-128-CTR\nmac@SSH=HMAC-SHA2-512 HMAC-SHA2-256\n' > /etc/crypto-policies/policies/modules/STIG.pmod
</parameter>
</function>
<function=run_cmd>
<parameter=command>
sed -i 's/^POLICY=.*/POLICY=FIPS:STIG/' /etc/crypto-policies/config
</parameter>
</function>
<function=run_cmd>
<parameter=command>
update-crypto-policies --apply
</parameter>
</function>
